basic_details.job_title: WBPSC Principal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Posts
basic_details.short_information: West Bengal Public Service Commission (WBPSC) has released the official Principal Notification 2026 on 30-04-2026 at the official website wbpsc.gov.in . A total of 12 vacancies have been announced under the WBPSC Principal Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 21 to 42 years with a qualification of Master’s Degree in Education, M.Ed., or M.A. in Education, along with 5 years of teaching experience, can apply online from 30-04-2026 to 03-07-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years as on 01-01-2026. Age Relaxation: Relaxable upto 5 years for SC/ST (West Bengal) and 3 years for OBC (West Bengal). PwBD up to 45 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s Degree, M.Ed. / M.Ed or M.A.
qualification.details: Principal : Masters' Degree (2-year regular course) with Honours at Graduation level, at least 55% marks in any school teaching subject from recognised University. M.Ed./M.Ed. (Elementary) with 55% marks OR M.A. in Education with 55% marks + Diploma/Degree in Primary/Elementary Education with 55% marks from recognised University/Institute. Five years experience of teaching in Primary or Elementary Teachers' Training Institute. Knowledge of Bengali language (spoken and written). Computer Literacy.

selection_process: for shortlisting only) Interview (merit based on interview marks only)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WBPSC Principal Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WBPSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download WBPSC Principal Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.west_bengal_public_service_commission_wb: Master’s Degree, M.Ed. / M.Ed or M.A.

content_sections.heading: WBPSC Principal Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the WBPSC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download WBPSC Principal Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: WBPSC Principal Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Principal : Masters' Degree (2-year regular course) with Honours at Graduation level, at least 55% marks in any school teaching subject from recognised University. M.Ed./M.Ed. (Elementary) with 55% marks OR M.A. in Education with 55% marks + Diploma/Degree in Primary/Elementary Education with 55% marks from recognised University/Institute. Five years experience of teaching in Primary or Elementary Teachers' Training Institute. Knowledge of Bengali language (spoken and written). Computer Literacy.

content_sections.heading: WBPSC Principal Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years as on 01-01-2026. Age Relaxation: Relaxable upto 5 years for SC/ST (West Bengal) and 3 years for OBC (West Bengal). PwBD up to 45 years.

rows.event: Closing date for submission of online application
Extended Last date for submission of online application

content_sections.heading: WBPSC Principal Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Screening Test (MCQ type, for shortlisting only) Interview (merit based on interview marks only)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WBPSC Principal Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WBPSC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WBPSC Principal recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online applications is 03 July 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Principal post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Master’s Degree with Honours at Graduation level (55% marks), M.Ed. or M.A. in Education with a Diploma/Degree in Primary/Elementary Education (55% marks), and five years of teaching experience in a relevant institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Principal position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Principal post is 42 years as of 01 January 2026. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Principal post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies for the post of Principal in the District Institute of Education and Training.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the WBPSC Principal recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 210/- plus service charges. SC/ST candidates from West Bengal and PwBD candidates (40% and above) are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Principal post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 67,300 to Rs. 1,73,200 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Screening Test (MCQ type) for shortlisting, followed by a merit-based Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside West Bengal apply for the SC/ST fee exemption?
faq.answer: No, the fee exemption for SC/ST categories is applicable only for candidates belonging to West Bengal.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided: up to 5 years for SC/ST (West Bengal) and 3 years for OBC (West Bengal). PwBD candidates can avail relaxation up to 45 years.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link are available on the WBPSC official website, which can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article.
